items.title: Fix off-by-one in the weekly KPI dashboard
items.notes: Manager spotted last week's numbers were a day shifted. Reproduce on staging first — funny enough, same timezone-boundary class of bug as my side-project streak reset.

nextAction.then: Open the dashboard query and check the date-range filter

items.title: Send the monthly shift-logistics report to Priya
items.notes: Pull the warehouse throughput numbers, drop them into the template.

items.title: Run the overnight Q2 data export
items.notes: Kick it off and let it run while I do other work; the server takes ~2h. Nothing to babysit.

items.title: Prep talking points for my 1:1 with my manager
items.notes: Three wins and one blocker.

nextAction.then: Jot 3 wins and 1 blocker in my notes app

items.title: Fix the streak-reset bug in the memorization tracker
items.notes: Streak resets at the wrong timezone midnight, so testers lose their hifdh streak unfairly.

items.title: Deploy the beta build for 5 testers
items.notes: My cousins plus two friends from the masjid agreed to test — can't ship until Apple approves the build.

items.title: Write the App Store short description
items.notes: Keep it to two warm sentences about building a daily hifdh habit.

items.title: Wait on TestFlight review approval
items.notes: Submitted to Apple; usually a day or two. Nothing to do but wait for the email.

items.title: Memorize Surah Al-Mulk verses 15-20
items.notes: Review the previous five ayahs first, then add one new line.

nextAction.if: after Fajr while my mind is fresh
nextAction.then: Recite the previous 5 ayahs, then add one new line

items.title: Read the fiqh chapter on Zakat for Thursday's class
items.notes: The Aalim course covers it this week; mark the questions I want to ask.

items.title: Write up the Aalim course assignment on Tahaarah
items.notes: 500 words, referencing the textbook chapter.

items.title: Order the apostilled safety document for Dad's Umrah
items.notes: He flies in three weeks; the travel agent needs the stamped, apostilled document this week.

nextAction.then: Call the notary office and ask for the apostille turnaround

items.title: Order winter clothes for my parents from the China site
items.notes: Browse and compare sellers while I'm on a call; let the cart sit, no rush.

items.title: Book the dentist check-up I keep putting off
items.notes: It's been over a year.

nextAction.then: Call the surgery on Old Street

items.title: Prep cousin Amina's maths tutoring sheet
items.notes: He's on quadratic equations now — pick 6 worked examples.

items.title: Renew the gym membership before the price goes up
items.notes: New-year rate ends Friday.

items.title: Grocery shop and meal-prep for the week
items.notes: Sunday batch cook so I stop buying lunch near the office.

items.title: Back up phone photos before storage fills
items.notes: Someday. Let it upload in the background overnight.

items.title: Read a chapter of the productivity book on the shelf
items.notes: Someday-maybe; it's been sitting there for months.

items.title: Ship v1.0 of the Quran memorization tracker
Fix the streak-reset timezone bug
Polish the onboarding screen copy
Submit the build to TestFlight
Collect feedback from the 5 testers
Write the App Store listing + screenshots
Get Dad ready for Umrah
Sort the travel paperwork
Order the apostilled safety document
Photocopy passport + vaccination card
Confirm the visa is attached to the booking
Pack and prepare the ihram kit
Buy two ihram towels and a money belt
Print the dua and ritual checklist booklet
Arrange logistics back home
Set up a call schedule while he's away
Brief Mum on the home admin he usually handles
Memorize Quran daily
items.notes: One new line a day, after Fajr. The willpower is in not letting a busy day break the streak.

items.title: Gym session (push / pull / legs)
items.notes: The hard one. Set the gym bag out the night before so there's no excuse.

items.title: 30 minutes of focused Arabic study
items.notes: Active grammar drills, not just passive reading.

items.title: No phone for the first 30 min after waking
items.notes: The constant pull to grab it is the real test.

items.title: Weekly review + plan the next week
items.notes: Sunday evening: clear the inbox, set next week's one focus.

rhythms.title: Sunnah rawatib with the daily prayers
Morning sunlight on the balcony with coffee
Walk to the masjid for Maghrib
Tidy the desk before logging off work
